title: Circle's Stance on Stablecoin Freezes
summary: Circle will only freeze its stablecoin with a court order or law enforcement direction, raising questions about decentralized control.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing debate about regulation and control in the stablecoin market amid crypto theft concerns.

title: The Rise of China's AI Agent Economy

title: Americans' Economic Discontent

title: Meta's AI-Driven Restructuring
